case_title: ALONZA LEE HAYES VS. INTERNATIONAL SALES, INC. A NEVADA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, ALONZA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SALES, INC. A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES, ALONZA LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SALES, INC. A NEVADA CORPORATION $38,998.87 PRINCIPAL, $192.47 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39,601.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
